calendar.matters:
Petitioners Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Verified Petition To Reduce Required Voting Percentage To Amend Amended And Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions, And Restrictions For Cominium Panorama (With Sale Lease Option)
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER'S AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION TO REDUCE REQUIRED VOTING PERCENTAGE TO AMEND AMENDED AND RESTATED DECLARATIONS OF COVENANTS, CONDITIONS, AND RESTRICTIONS is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

order is signed.

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)
